title: solanum megistacrolobum subsp. toralapanum
intro: Solanum megistacrolobum subsp. toralapanum is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae, commonly referred to as a type of nightshade. Traditionally, this plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, contributing to its therapeutic benefits. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
